CONTENT.Honours: Zagłębie Lubin IIIV liga Lower Silesia West: 2016–17Raków CzęstochowaPolish Cup: 2020–21Red Bull SalzburgAustrian Bundesliga: 2021–22Austrian Cup: 2021–22IndividualEkstraklasa Young Player of the Season: 2020–21Ekstraklasa Young Player of the Month: March 2021, April 2021
CONTENT.Club career: During his youth career, Piątkowski played for UKS 6 Jasło, Karpaty Krosno and Zagłębie Lubin.Piątkowski started his senior career at Zagłębie Lubin II, Zagłębie's reserve team in 2018, he signed for Raków Częstochowa where he played for two years.In 2021, Piątkowski moved to Austria to play for Red Bull Salzburg. He was loaned out to Belgian side Gent in 2023. In January 2024, he joined Spanish La Liga club Granada CF on a six-month loan. Piątkowski returned to Red Bull at the end of the season.
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 2 August 2024NotesAs of match played 5 September 2021.
CONTENT.International career: From 2014 to 2022, Piątkowski played for various Polish youth national teams.Piątkowski made his senior debut for Poland on 28 March 2021 in a World Cup qualifier against Andorra.

SUMMARY: Kamil Piątkowski (born 21 June 2000) is a Polish professional footballer who plays as a defender for Austrian Bundesliga club Red Bull Salzburg.
